sn48.68:1.1:
"Bhikkhus, just as, among the trees of the Tāvatiṁsa devas the coral tree
is declared to be their chief, so too, among the states conducive to enlightenment the faculty of wisdom is declared to be their chief, that is, for the attainment of enlightenment.
"And what, bhikkhus, are the states conducive to enlightenment? The faculty of faith … The faculty of wisdom … that is, for the attainment of enlightenment."
